title: Custodial Inspector Amendment (Protection from Reprisal) Act 2025
text: Custodial Inspector Amendment (Protection from Reprisal) Act 2025 An Act to amend the Custodial Inspector Act 2016 to provide for protections from reprisal [Royal Assent 23 December 2025] Be it enacted by Her Excellency the Governor of Tasmania, by and with the advice and consent of the Legislative Council and House of Assembly, in Parliament assembled, as follows: 1. Short title This Act may be cited as the Custodial Inspector Amendment (Protection from Reprisal) Act 2025 . 2. Commencement This Act commences on the day on which this Act receives the Royal Assent. 3. Principal Act In this Act, the Custodial Inspector Act 2016 is referred to as the Principal Act. 4. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Custodial Inspector Act 2016 . 5. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Custodial Inspector Act 2016 . 6. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Custodial Inspector Act 2016 . 7. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Custodial Inspector Act 2016 . 8. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Custodial Inspector Act 2016 . 9. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Custodial Inspector Act 2016 . 10. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Custodial Inspector Act 2016 . 11. Repeal of Act This Act is repealed on the three hundred and sixty fifth day from the day on which all of the provisions of this Act commence. from top.html -->
